name: viking_bronisze_e8_gray_demo_with_legend_excluded
description: E8 gray demo baseline with the UI legend zone excluded. Templates are extracted fresh from the PDF legend during regression.
scope: This golden intentionally excludes the legend area selected in the UI.
Regression must extract E8 templates fresh from the PDF legend zone before detection.
The static fixture PNGs remain reference images for extraction hash/geometry tests.
knownLimitations: Changing the UI legend zone changes total count by design.
Do not compare this 74-box baseline to the older full-page 81-box baseline without accounting for the excluded legend.
